items.name: performance-optimization
items.title: Performance Optimization
items.description: Optimize a performance problem by profiling to find the real bottleneck before changing anything, making one targeted change, and verifying both the improvement and that correctness did not degrade. Use when a feature is measurably slow, a page load or API response exceeds a budget, a query is taking too long, or a user reports sluggishness. Do not use to pre-optimize code that has not been measured to be slow.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
